pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build configuration claims to target Java 17, which is inconsistent with the migration goal and may prevent usage of Java 21 specific features or cause warnings/errors if strict compliance is enforced.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Lombok dependency to the project to support annotation processing.
Define the Lombok version property in the POM.
Configure the maven-compiler-plugin to use source and target level 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this explicit configuration, the compiler might default to an older version or the property might not be picked up correctly by the plugin configuration, leading to compilation errors for Java 21 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Lombok to the annotation processor paths in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, Lombok annotations will not be processed during compilation, leading to compile errors for classes using Lombok features.

src/main/java/net/petcu/store/aop/loggin.general_idea: Add wildcard import for the new custom exception hierarchy to support pattern matching in the logging aspect.
Add a guard clause to handle StoreException subclasses with specific logging before the generic development profile logging.
Implement a helper method using Java 17+ pattern matching switch to log specific details for different StoreException subclasses.

src/test/java/net/petcu/store/web/rest/T.general_idea: Update equalsVerifier to support Java records by detecting record classes and using reflection to instantiate them with default values.
src/test/java/net/petcu/store/web/rest/T.after: if (clazz.isRecord()) { T recordObject1 = createRecordInstance(clazz); ... } else { T domainObject1 = clazz.getConstructor().newInstance(); ... }

src/test/java/net/petcu/store/web/rest/T.general_idea: Add helper method to create record instances using reflection and default values for components.
src/test/java/net/petcu/store/web/rest/T.after: private static <T> T createRecordInstance(Class<T> recordClass) throws Exception { ... }

src/test/java/net/petcu/store/web/rest/T.general_idea: Add helper method to return default values for common types used in record instantiation.
